title: Particle IoT API credentials should not be disclosed
description: Particle is an IoT platform for connected devices. Particle access tokens authenticate API calls to manage devices, flash firmware, read device data, and control device functions. Exposing tokens allows unauthorized control of IoT devices.
recommendation: Remove Particle access tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at console.particle.io.
impact: Unauthorized control of IoT devices, remote firmware flashing, access to device telemetry, and product management.

checks.message: Particle IoT access token detected. Particle tokens authenticate API calls to manage IoT devices including flashing firmware to remote devices, reading device variables and telemetry, calling device functions, managing product fleets, and accessing event streams. Exposing this token allows unauthorized control of all devices in your account. Rotate at console.particle.io and review device event logs.
